failed_attempts.sql:
WITH publications AS 
    (SELECT p.id AS publication_id, p.profile_id
     FROM profile p
     LEFT JOIN publication_collab c ON p.id  =  c.profile_id
     WHERE p.username  =  'haight_clothing'),
    collaborators AS (
        SELECT c.publication_id, c.profile_id
         FROM profile p
      JOIN publication_collab c ON p.id  =  c.profile_id
          AND c.publication_id IN (SELECT id FROM publications)),
    result AS (
        SELECT DISTINCT CASE WHEN p2.id IS NOT NULL THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_selling_online,
             p1.profile_id, p1.id AS publication_id
         FROM profile p1
      LEFT JOIN publishers p2 ON p1.username  =  p2.username
          AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
     FROM profile_relationship pr
      WHERE pr.origin_profile_id  =  p1.profile_id
           OR pr.destination_profile_id  =  p1.profile_id
         
    )
      INTERSECT
    SELECT publication_id
     FROM publications) SELECT profile_id,
        CASE WHEN result.is_selling_online THEN TRUE ELSE FALSE END AS is_selling_online FROM publications
 ORDER BY result.is_selling_online DESC LIMIT 10
